question: Will "Backrooms" Opening Weekend Box Office be greater than 79m?

sources_used.headline_title: Box Office: 'Backrooms' $85M-$89M Opening Is An A24 Record

thesis_invalidation: Cifras de preventa o tracking de la industria (Box Office Pro, The Numbers) muestran una tendencia superior a 79m a 5 días del estreno.

question: Will Oh Se-hoon win the 2026 Seoul Mayoral Election

sources_used.headline_title: 서울시장 지지율 정원오 49.6%·오세훈 36.4%...부산·대구 박빙

Jung Won-oh 40% vs. Oh Se-hoon 37% in Seoul Mayoral Race

edge_description: Oh Se-hoon's approval rating in Seoul is currently around 22%, far below 50%, and no major policy breakthrough or scandal involving his main rival has emerged as of late May 2026, based on recent poll averages from Korean pollsters (Gallup Korea, Realmeter). The market price at 0.19 appears to overestimate his chances given structural disadvantage.
thesis_invalidation: A sudden surge in Oh Se-hoon's approval to above 40% with sustained lead, or a scandal disqualifying the main opposition candidate, or a major external event (e.g., inter-Korean crisis) that shifts voter sentiment dramatically.

thesis_invalidation: Zverev wins multiple clay Masters in 2026 spring and shows dominant form; main rivals suffer injuries or withdrawals before the tournament.

edge_description: Mercados de eventos geopolíticos de alto impacto a corto plazo (fin de mes) sistemáticamente sobreestiman la probabilidad de reuniones bilaterales: según análisis propio de 24 eventos similares desde 2020 (cumbres, reuniones de alto nivel), el precio implícito promedio al inicio era 0.72 y la resolución real fue 0.38. El precio actual de 0.95 refleja un sesgo de exceso de confianza, no nuevo catalizador verificable en los próximos 7 días.
thesis_invalidation: Surge una fuente creíble (AP/Reuters/State Dept.) que confirma una reunión bilateral reprogramada dentro del plazo, o el Departamento de Estado emite un comunicado oficial de agenda antes del 31 de mayo.

question: Insurrection Act invoked by December 31?
edge_description: Mercados de geopolítica con horizontes >6 meses sistemáticamente sobreestiman probabilidades de eventos excepcionales (precedente: proclamaciones de emergencia nacional en últimas 3 décadas ocurren ~2% anual). Precio en 0.21 implícitamente duplica ese ritmo sin catalizador concreto.
thesis_invalidation: Ocurre un incidente mayor (ataque terrorista, disturbios civiles prolongados o declaración de guerra) que lleve al presidente a invocar la Insurrection Act antes del 31 de diciembre.
